title: VN4's Deep Dark Revamp
description: This pack completely overhauls Minecraft's Sculk while trying to keep the Vanilla Style.
body:
![Vn4 Presents](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78f6ab45cfab60dceefdb9b8be5507383e19b622.png)
![DDR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22cb3ed693fa5f2016602e9f7d8fa3c4a9b4af36.png)
#
This pack completely overhauls Minecraft's Sculk while trying to keep the Vanilla Style.

<details>
<summary>Includes:</summary>
  
- ### Drastic changes to all sculk blocks.
  ![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0ed960e0a4eb9661e9f916d655db5277811279c.png)
- ### Several new Warden variants and their respective sub-variants.
  ![Wardens](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b5599b3b4f58f0f6072d1299bb8b2381108f9e.png)
- ### Emissive textures.
  ![Emissives](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eb8e37d968f53c2c2562030df62891e1d0e9ffc.png)
- ### Deepslate Chests.
  ![Chests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf0b8e6b2116e85dd8428a184576c2ea00be6b1.png)
</details>

![requirements](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6fc9f511dc95fdeb95f153ee45915f317eb37f4e.png)
